title: Alpha scattering from 92Zr and 94Zr.

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Nuclear Physics, Section A, Vol.458, p.1 (1986)

x4freetext: Target thicknesses were determined by normalizing
forward angle cross sections to the optical model
predictions. Thin target thickness was determined by
normalizing 3-1 cross sections to the thick target data

x4code.headerHelp: Error in value of quantity, defined under ERR-ANALYS

x4freetext: No information about source of uncertainty
with an optical model potential of Woods-Saxon type.

x4headers.headerHelp: Energy of incident projectile, laboratory system

x4freetext: was obtained. For higher excited states (Ex > 2 MeV)
thin targets were used. 92Zr target was a
self-supporting foil with a thickness of 220 ug/cm2.
